note: The question that opens a story: qué hiciste ayer? = what did you do yesterday?
From ir. Irregular: fui al gimnasio = I went to the gym.
From estar. estuve en Albir = I was in Albir; used for being in a place.
From quedarse. me quedé en casa = I stayed home. Regular -ar verb: -é ending.
From comer. Regular -er verb: -í ending. comí en un bar.
From beber. -í ending: bebí una cerveza = I drank a beer.
From comprar. -é ending: compré ropa nueva = I bought new clothes.
From visitar. -é ending: visité Altea = I visited Altea.
From caminar. -é ending: caminé al faro = I walked to the lighthouse.
From subir. -í ending: subí la montaña = I climbed the mountain.
In Spain you "make" photos: hice fotos. hice is the past of hacer (to do/make).
tomar algo = to have a drink/bite; past: tomé algo en la plaza = I had a drink in the square.
